cases.note: derives a short title from the first useful clause, stripping leading 'can you please' filler and the trailing question
cases.input: Can you please refactor the auth middleware to use JWT tokens?
cases.expected: Refactor the auth middleware to use JWT

cases.note: strips markup, links, emoji, and punctuation; first clause ends at the '.' inside src/auth.ts
cases.input: Please fix `src/auth.ts`!!! https://example.com 🔥 then add tests

cases.note: keeps useful text after common issue prefixes
cases.input: Issue #2056: Opt-in generated tab titles for agents
cases.expected: Opt in generated tab titles for agents

cases.note: bounds titles to GENERATED_TAB_TITLE_MAX_LENGTH (40) by truncating at a word boundary
cases.input: I want to replace the terminal reconnection hydration flow with a safer retry path

cases.note: returns null (JSON null) when the prompt has no useful title text after filler removal
capitalizes the first letter of a plain clause
splits on sentence punctuation and keeps only the first clause
